layers.title: Layer 1 — Core Engineering + DSA (Non-Negotiable)
layers.description: Strong foundations bring stability; rushing ahead brings cracks.

JavaScript / TypeScript
C++ (Performance & DSA heavy lifting)

REST APIs, async systems

layers.title: Layer 2 — Math + ML Foundations (+ DSA Continues)

Linked Lists, Trees (DFS, BFS), Heaps, Tries, Hash Tables

NLP (SpaCy, NLTK), Computer Vision (OpenCV, YOLO, SAM), Recommendation systems

layers.title: Layer 6 — Autonomous Agents & High-Performance Runtimes

items.title: Rust-based runtimes, WebAssembly (Wasm) execution

CUDA programming basics, TensorRT, vLLM / ONNX optimization
